lilypond.log: LilyPond not installed. Install and re-run scripts/render_pipeline.py.

musicxml.log: music21 not installed. pip install music21 and re-run.

midi.log: abc2midi not installed. Install abcmidi and re-run.

fingering.log: Static starter SVG generated for L2 review.

audio.log: fluidsynth not installed. Install fluidsynth + soundfont and re-run.

songsheet.log: ReportLab not installed. pip install reportlab and re-run.
